synthesis.content: Chile has announced tax incentives for renewable hydrogen and subsidies for H2V demand, as well as tax credits for green investments. The share of fossil fuels in total energy demand has fallen, with oil accounting for 43% of total energy demand. The energy sector accounts for three-quarters of total greenhouse gas emissions, with carbon dioxide emissions peaking in 2019 and declining by roughly 20% since then.

sentences: Chile has announced tax incentives for renewable hydrogen and subsidies for H2V demand, as well as tax credits for green investments.
The share of fossil fuels in total energy demand has fallen, with oil accounting for 43% of total energy demand.
The energy sector accounts for three-quarters of total greenhouse gas emissions, with carbon dioxide emissions peaking in 2019 and declining by roughly 20% since then.
alternate_contents: Chile has announced tax incentives for renewable hydrogen and a subsidy for H2V demand, as well as tax credits for investments with a green dimension. The share of fossil fuels in total energy demand has fallen, and the energy sector accounts for three-quarters of total greenhouse gas emissions. Carbon dioxide emissions from the energy sector have declined by roughly 20% since peaking in 2019. Most fossil fuels are imported at a significant cost.

Chile has implemented tax incentives for renewable hydrogen and subsidies for H2V demand, as well as tax credits for green investments. The share of fossil fuels in total energy demand has fallen from 78% to 64%, with most fossil fuels being imported at a significant cost. Renewable energy sources, such as solar photovoltaics and hydropower, have increased their share of generation, with solar PV accounting for 23% and hydropower for 29% in 2024.
issues: at least one sentence has zero consistency support
